query:
SELECT mc.id, mc.colorCode, mc.colorName, mc.imageUrl, mc.thumbnailUrl, mb.boardNumber, ms.code as supplierCode
FROM material_colors mc
LEFT JOIN material_boards mb ON mc.boardId = mb.id
LEFT JOIN material_suppliers ms ON mb.supplierId = ms.id
WHERE mc.colorCode = 'ORIGINAL-ORIG-01'
LIMIT 1;
